---
title: "Robustness Analysis"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

############################################################
# 0) LOAD RETAINED DATA (CSV exports from QC pipeline)
#    Then reproduce transporter vs non-transporter pie charts
############################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(scales)
})

setwd("/SynologyDrive/PhD/Projects/SpringBloom2021/DataAnalysis_SpringBloom2021/Supplementary/TransporterInvestment/Robustness_Analysis/")

# ---- Paths (edit if you put the CSVs elsewhere)
protein_path <- "../../../Figure_04/Data_Filtration/retained_protein_table.csv"
species_path <- "../../../Figure_04/Data_Filtration/retained_species.csv"
keys_path    <- "../../../Figure_04/Data_Filtration/retained_species_dates.csv"
species_summary_path <- "../../../../Data/Species_Data/Final_Data/Species_Table.csv"


# ---- Load
protein_final          <- read_csv(protein_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
retained_species       <- read_csv(species_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
retained_species_dates <- read_csv(keys_path,    show_col_types = FALSE)
species_taxonomy <- read_csv(species_summary_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
species_abundance <- read_csv(species_summary_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

species_abundance <- species_abundance %>%
  select(Species_ID, Date, Species_Abundance)

species_taxonomy <- species_taxonomy %>%
  dplyr::select(Species_ID, Phylum, Class, Order, Family, Genus, Species) %>%
  distinct()

# ---- Basic cleanup / checks
protein_final <- protein_final %>% mutate(Date = as.Date(Date))
retained_species_dates <- retained_species_dates %>% mutate(Date = as.Date(Date))

stopifnot(
  all(c("Species_ID","Protein_ID","Date","Group_For_Plots") %in% names(protein_final)),
  all(c("Species_ID","Date","Group_For_Plots") %in% names(retained_species_dates))
)

cat("\n=== Loaded retained datasets ===\n")
cat("protein_final rows:", nrow(protein_final), "\n")
cat("retained species×dates:", nrow(retained_species_dates), "\n")
cat("retained species:", nrow(retained_species), "\n")

glimpse(protein_final)
glimpse(retained_species)
glimpse(retained_species_dates)
glimpse(species_taxonomy)
glimpse(species_abundance)
```

```{r}
####################################################################################################
# BLOCK A — NON-AGGREGATED ROBUSTNESS MODELS MATCHING THE PRIMARY MODEL DEFINITIONS
#
# PURPOSE
# -------
# Refit the primary trophic-index relationships at the native observation level rather than after
# species-level averaging, while keeping the biological response definitions and model structure
# aligned with the primary species-level models.
#
# PRIMARY ALIGNMENT
# -----------------
# TPF:
#   - same response definition as primary model:
#       transporter abundance / total abundance
#   - same beta(logit) family
#   - same covariate logic:
#       trophic index + protein recovery
#   - same taxonomic random effect:
#       (1 | Phylum)
#   - additional repeated-measures random effect:
#       (1 | Species_ID)
#
# Bray-Curtis:
#   - same response definition as primary model:
#       transporter-only KEGG intensity profiles
#   - same consecutive-date logic as primary model:
#       Bray-Curtis is computed only between adjacent dates in the filtered retained date sequence
#       for each species, NOT strict calendar-day adjacency
#   - same Gaussian-on-logit-scale family
#   - same covariate logic:
#       trophic index + mean paired protein recovery
#   - same taxonomic random effect:
#       (1 | Phylum)
#   - additional repeated-measures random effect:
#       (1 | Species_ID)
#
####################################################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(vegan)
  library(glmmTMB)
  library(performance)
  library(patchwork)
  library(scales)
  library(readr)
  library(gt)
  library(DHARMa)
  library(broom.mixed)
})

set.seed(1)

############################################################
# 1) SETTINGS
############################################################

out_dir <- "BlockA_PrimaryAligned_NonAggregated"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

dpi_out <- 300
eps <- 1e-6

# Keep this consistent with the filtered retained workflow
min_valid_dates_per_species <- 5

trophic_cols <- c(
  "Oligotroph"   = "#99C3E6",
  "Intermediate" = "#ECEAE9",
  "Copiotroph"   = "#B25009"
)

############################################################
# 2) BASIC CHECKS
############################################################

stopifnot(
  exists("protein_final"),
  exists("retained_species"),
  exists("retained_species_dates"),
  exists("species_taxonomy")
)

required_protein_cols <- c(
  "Species_ID", "Protein_ID", "Date", "Group_For_Plots",
  "TrophicIndex", "Protein_Abundance_IBAQ_Norm",
  "KEGG_Subcategory", "KEGG_ID"
)

required_species_cols <- c("Species_ID", "Group_For_Plots")
required_species_date_cols <- c("Species_ID", "Date", "Group_For_Plots")
required_tax_cols <- c("Species_ID", "Phylum", "Class")

stopifnot(all(required_protein_cols %in% names(protein_final)))
stopifnot(all(required_species_cols %in% names(retained_species)))
stopifnot(all(required_species_date_cols %in% names(retained_species_dates)))
stopifnot(all(required_tax_cols %in% names(species_taxonomy)))

protein_final <- protein_final %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date))

retained_species_dates <- retained_species_dates %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date))

species_taxonomy_use <- species_taxonomy %>%
  dplyr::select(Species_ID, Phylum, Class) %>%
  distinct()

############################################################
# 3) HELPERS
############################################################

theme_nat <- function(base_size = 11) {
  theme_bw(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 1),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = base_size - 1),
      axis.title = element_text(size = base_size),
      axis.text = element_text(size = base_size - 1, colour = "black"),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      legend.key = element_blank(),
      plot.margin = margin(6, 6, 6, 6)
    )
}

recode_plot_group <- function(x) {
  out <- dplyr::case_when(
    x == "Oligo_like"   ~ "Oligotroph",
    x == "Copio_like"   ~ "Copiotroph",
    x == "Intermediate" ~ "Intermediate",
    TRUE                ~ NA_character_
  )
  factor(out, levels = c("Oligotroph", "Intermediate", "Copiotroph"))
}

logit_bounded <- function(x, eps = 1e-6) {
  x2 <- pmin(pmax(x, eps), 1 - eps)
  qlogis(x2)
}

inv_logit <- function(x) {
  plogis(x)
}

scale_z <- function(x) {
  s <- sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (!is.finite(s) || s == 0) return(rep(0, length(x)))
  as.numeric(scale(x))
}

fmt_num <- function(x, digits = 3) {
  ifelse(is.na(x), "NA", formatC(x, digits = digits, format = "fg", flag = "#"))
}

fmt_p <- function(x) {
  ifelse(
    is.na(x), "NA",
    ifelse(x < 0.001, "<0.001", formatC(x, digits = 3, format = "fg", flag = "#"))
  )
}

extract_fixed_effect <- function(model, term_name = "TrophicIndex_z") {
  sm <- summary(model)$coefficients$cond
  if (!term_name %in% rownames(sm)) {
    return(tibble(
      estimate = NA_real_,
      std_error = NA_real_,
      p_value = NA_real_
    ))
  }
  tibble(
    estimate  = unname(sm[term_name, "Estimate"]),
    std_error = unname(sm[term_name, "Std. Error"]),
    p_value   = unname(sm[term_name, "Pr(>|z|)"])
  )
}

safe_numeric <- function(x) {
  out <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  if (length(out) == 0 || all(is.na(out))) NA_real_ else out[1]
}

############################################################
# 4) SHARED RETAINED UNIVERSE
############################################################

species_traits <- protein_final %>%
  distinct(Species_ID, TrophicIndex, Group_For_Plots)

analysis_species_dates <- retained_species_dates %>%
  semi_join(retained_species, by = c("Species_ID", "Group_For_Plots")) %>%
  left_join(species_traits, by = c("Species_ID", "Group_For_Plots")) %>%
  left_join(species_taxonomy_use, by = "Species_ID") %>%
  mutate(TrophicGroupPlot = recode_plot_group(Group_For_Plots)) %>%
  distinct(Species_ID, Date, Group_For_Plots, TrophicIndex, TrophicGroupPlot, Phylum, Class) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(TrophicIndex),
    !is.na(TrophicGroupPlot),
    !is.na(Phylum),
    !is.na(Class)
  ) %>%
  arrange(Species_ID, Date)

prot_counts <- protein_final %>%
  semi_join(
    analysis_species_dates %>% select(Species_ID, Date),
    by = c("Species_ID", "Date")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, Date) %>%
  summarise(
    N_prot_detected = n_distinct(Protein_ID),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

analysis_species_dates <- analysis_species_dates %>%
  left_join(prot_counts, by = c("Species_ID", "Date"))

species_date_counts <- analysis_species_dates %>%
  count(Species_ID, name = "n_dates")

analysis_species_dates <- analysis_species_dates %>%
  left_join(species_date_counts, by = "Species_ID") %>%
  filter(n_dates >= min_valid_dates_per_species)

write_csv(
  analysis_species_dates,
  file.path(out_dir, "BlockA_analysis_species_dates.csv")
)

############################################################
# 5) BLOCK A1 — DATE-LEVEL TPF DATA
#
# Same TPF definition as the primary model, but without averaging to one row per species.
############################################################

protein_flagged <- protein_final %>%
  mutate(
    is_transporter = !is.na(KEGG_Subcategory) &
      str_detect(KEGG_Subcategory, "\\bTransporters\\b"),
    abund = Protein_Abundance_IBAQ_Norm
  )

species_date_tpf <- protein_flagged %>%
  semi_join(
    analysis_species_dates %>% select(Species_ID, Date),
    by = c("Species_ID", "Date")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, Date) %>%
  summarise(
    abund_total = sum(abund, na.rm = TRUE),
    abund_trans = sum(abund[is_transporter], na.rm = TRUE),
    TPF = abund_trans / abund_total,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    analysis_species_dates %>%
      select(Species_ID, Date, TrophicIndex, Group_For_Plots, TrophicGroupPlot, Phylum, Class, N_prot_detected, n_dates),
    by = c("Species_ID", "Date")
  ) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(TPF),
    abund_total > 0,
    TPF > 0,
    TPF < 1,
    is.finite(TrophicIndex),
    is.finite(N_prot_detected),
    N_prot_detected > 0,
    !is.na(TrophicGroupPlot),
    !is.na(Phylum),
    !is.na(Class)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    TrophicIndex_z       = scale_z(TrophicIndex),
    n_dates_z            = scale_z(n_dates),
    log_prot_detected_z  = scale_z(log1p(N_prot_detected)),
    Species_ID           = factor(Species_ID),
    Phylum               = factor(Phylum)
  )

write_csv(
  species_date_tpf,
  file.path(out_dir, "BlockA_date_level_TPF_data.csv")
)

############################################################
# 6) BLOCK A2 — TRANSITION-LEVEL TRANSPORTER BRAY-CURTIS DATA
#
# EXACTLY aligned to the primary BC workflow:
#   - transporter-only KEGG profiles
#   - consecutive dates only
#   - consecutive means adjacent in the filtered retained date sequence
############################################################

kegg_sd_trans <- protein_final %>%
  semi_join(
    analysis_species_dates %>% select(Species_ID, Date),
    by = c("Species_ID", "Date")
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(KEGG_ID),
    !is.na(KEGG_Subcategory),
    str_detect(KEGG_Subcategory, "\\bTransporters\\b")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, Date, KEGG_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    kegg_abund = sum(Protein_Abundance_IBAQ_Norm, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(kegg_abund), kegg_abund > 0)

compute_species_transitions_bc <- function(sp_id, keep_tbl, kegg_tbl) {

  dates_tbl <- keep_tbl %>%
    filter(Species_ID == sp_id) %>%
    arrange(Date)

  dates <- dates_tbl$Date
  if (length(dates) < 2) return(NULL)

  mat_wide <- kegg_tbl %>%
    filter(Species_ID == sp_id, Date %in% dates) %>%
    mutate(Date_chr = as.character(Date)) %>%
    select(Date_chr, KEGG_ID, kegg_abund) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = KEGG_ID,
      values_from = kegg_abund,
      values_fill = 0
    ) %>%
    arrange(Date_chr)

  if (nrow(mat_wide) < 2 || ncol(mat_wide) < 2) return(NULL)

  present_dates_chr <- mat_wide$Date_chr
  present_dates <- as.Date(present_dates_chr)

  M_abs <- as.matrix(mat_wide %>% select(-Date_chr))
  rownames(M_abs) <- present_dates_chr

  # Consecutive retained dates only
  pair_tbl <- tibble(
    Date1 = present_dates[-length(present_dates)],
    Date2 = present_dates[-1]
  )

  out <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(pair_tbl)), function(i) {
    d1 <- as.character(pair_tbl$Date1[i])
    d2 <- as.character(pair_tbl$Date2[i])

    bc_abs <- as.numeric(
      vegan::vegdist(
        M_abs[c(d1, d2), , drop = FALSE],
        method = "bray"
      )
    )

    nd1 <- keep_tbl %>%
      filter(Species_ID == sp_id, Date == as.Date(d1)) %>%
      pull(N_prot_detected)

    nd2 <- keep_tbl %>%
      filter(Species_ID == sp_id, Date == as.Date(d2)) %>%
      pull(N_prot_detected)

    tibble(
      Species_ID  = sp_id,
      Date1       = as.Date(d1),
      Date2       = as.Date(d2),
      bc_abs      = bc_abs,
      N_prot_pair = mean(c(nd1, nd2), na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  })

  bind_rows(out)
}

all_species <- sort(unique(analysis_species_dates$Species_ID))

transitions <- bind_rows(lapply(
  all_species,
  compute_species_transitions_bc,
  keep_tbl = analysis_species_dates,
  kegg_tbl = kegg_sd_trans
)) %>%
  left_join(
    analysis_species_dates %>%
      distinct(Species_ID, TrophicIndex, Group_For_Plots, TrophicGroupPlot, Phylum, Class),
    by = "Species_ID"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(bc_abs),
    is.finite(N_prot_pair),
    !is.na(TrophicGroupPlot),
    !is.na(Phylum),
    !is.na(Class)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    mean_bc_abs_logit = logit_bounded(bc_abs, eps = eps),
    TrophicIndex_z    = scale_z(TrophicIndex),
    log_prot_pair_z   = scale_z(log1p(N_prot_pair)),
    Species_ID        = factor(Species_ID),
    Phylum            = factor(Phylum)
  )

write_csv(
  transitions,
  file.path(out_dir, "BlockA_transition_level_BrayCurtis_data.csv")
)

############################################################
# 7) FIT NON-AGGREGATED PRIMARY-ALIGNED MODELS
############################################################
# Primary model logic is preserved, but Species_ID is added as
# a random intercept because Block A uses repeated observations.

m_tpf_blockA <- glmmTMB(
  TPF ~ TrophicIndex_z + n_dates_z + log_prot_detected_z +
    (1 | Phylum) + (1 | Species_ID),
  family = beta_family(link = "logit"),
  data = species_date_tpf
)

m_bc_blockA <- glmmTMB(
  mean_bc_abs_logit ~ TrophicIndex_z + log_prot_pair_z +
    (1 | Phylum) + (1 | Species_ID),
  family = gaussian(),
  data = transitions
)

############################################################
# 8) BUILD MODEL-IMPLIED PREDICTIONS
############################################################

pred_tpf <- tibble(
  TrophicIndex = seq(
    min(species_date_tpf$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE),
    max(species_date_tpf$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE),
    length.out = 300
  )
) %>%
  mutate(
    TrophicIndex_z      = (TrophicIndex - mean(species_date_tpf$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE)) /
                          sd(species_date_tpf$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_dates_z           = 0,
    log_prot_detected_z = 0,
    Phylum              = factor(levels(species_date_tpf$Phylum)[1], levels = levels(species_date_tpf$Phylum)),
    Species_ID          = factor(levels(species_date_tpf$Species_ID)[1], levels = levels(species_date_tpf$Species_ID))
  )

pred_tpf$fit <- predict(
  m_tpf_blockA,
  newdata = pred_tpf,
  type = "response",
  re.form = NA
)

pred_bc <- tibble(
  TrophicIndex = seq(
    min(transitions$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE),
    max(transitions$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE),
    length.out = 300
  )
) %>%
  mutate(
    TrophicIndex_z  = (TrophicIndex - mean(transitions$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE)) /
                      sd(transitions$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE),
    log_prot_pair_z = 0,
    Phylum          = factor(levels(transitions$Phylum)[1], levels = levels(transitions$Phylum)),
    Species_ID      = factor(levels(transitions$Species_ID)[1], levels = levels(transitions$Species_ID))
  )

pred_bc$fit_logit <- predict(
  m_bc_blockA,
  newdata = pred_bc,
  type = "response",
  re.form = NA
)

pred_bc <- pred_bc %>%
  mutate(
    fit_bc_raw = inv_logit(fit_logit)
  )

write_csv(pred_tpf, file.path(out_dir, "BlockA_pred_tpf.csv"))
write_csv(pred_bc,  file.path(out_dir, "BlockA_pred_bc.csv"))

############################################################
# 9) EXTRACT MODEL SUMMARY STATISTICS
############################################################

fix_tpf <- extract_fixed_effect(m_tpf_blockA, "TrophicIndex_z")
fix_bc  <- extract_fixed_effect(m_bc_blockA,  "TrophicIndex_z")

r2_tpf <- r2_nakagawa(m_tpf_blockA)
r2_bc  <- r2_nakagawa(m_bc_blockA)

model_table_raw <- bind_rows(
  tibble(
    Response         = "Date-level TPF",
    Level            = "Species × date",
    Family           = "Beta (logit)",
    `Fixed effects`  = "Trophic index + n dates + species-date protein recovery",
    `Random effects` = "(1 | Phylum) + (1 | Species_ID)",
    N                = nrow(species_date_tpf),
    `TI estimate`    = fix_tpf$estimate,
    `TI SE`          = fix_tpf$std_error,
    `TI p`           = fix_tpf$p_value,
    `Marginal R2`    = safe_numeric(r2_tpf$R2_marginal),
    `Conditional R2` = safe_numeric(r2_tpf$R2_conditional),
    `Key conclusion` = "The negative trophic-index association with transporter allocation is retained without species-level averaging."
  ),
  tibble(
    Response         = "Transition-level transporter Bray-Curtis",
    Level            = "Species × consecutive-date pair",
    Family           = "Gaussian on logit scale",
    `Fixed effects`  = "Trophic index + paired species protein recovery",
    `Random effects` = "(1 | Phylum) + (1 | Species_ID)",
    N                = nrow(transitions),
    `TI estimate`    = fix_bc$estimate,
    `TI SE`          = fix_bc$std_error,
    `TI p`           = fix_bc$p_value,
    `Marginal R2`    = safe_numeric(r2_bc$R2_marginal),
    `Conditional R2` = safe_numeric(r2_bc$R2_conditional),
    `Key conclusion` = "The positive trophic-index association with transporter variability is retained without species-level averaging."
  )
)

write.csv(
  model_table_raw,
  file = file.path(out_dir, "BlockA_nonaggregated_model_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

############################################################
# 10) FIGURE PANEL A — DATE-LEVEL TPF
############################################################

p_a <- ggplot(
  species_date_tpf,
  aes(x = TrophicIndex, y = TPF, fill = TrophicGroupPlot)
) +
  geom_point(
    shape = 21,
    colour = "black",
    size = 1.7,
    stroke = 0.2,
    alpha = 0.55
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = pred_tpf,
    aes(x = TrophicIndex, y = fit),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 1.0,
    colour = "black"
  ) +
  geom_rug(
    aes(x = TrophicIndex),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    data = species_date_tpf,
    sides = "b",
    alpha = 0.18,
    linewidth = 0.25
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = trophic_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  coord_cartesian(
    ylim = c(0, 1)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = number_format(accuracy = 0.01)) +
  labs(
    title = "A. Non-aggregated TPF",
    subtitle = paste0("Species × date beta-model fit (n = ", nrow(species_date_tpf), ")"),
    x = "Trophic index",
    y = "Transporter proteome fraction"
  ) +
  theme_nat()

############################################################
# 11) FIGURE PANEL B — TRANSITION-LEVEL BRAY-CURTIS
############################################################

p_b <- ggplot(
  transitions,
  aes(x = TrophicIndex, y = bc_abs, fill = TrophicGroupPlot)
) +
  geom_point(
    shape = 21,
    colour = "black",
    size = 1.7,
    stroke = 0.2,
    alpha = 0.55
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = pred_bc,
    aes(x = TrophicIndex, y = fit_bc_raw),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 1.0,
    colour = "black"
  ) +
  geom_rug(
    aes(x = TrophicIndex),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    data = transitions,
    sides = "b",
    alpha = 0.18,
    linewidth = 0.25
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = trophic_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  coord_cartesian(
    ylim = c(0, 1)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = number_format(accuracy = 0.01)) +
  labs(
    title = "B. Non-aggregated Bray-Curtis dissimilarity",
    subtitle = paste0("Species × consecutive-date pair Gaussian-model fit (n = ", nrow(transitions), ")"),
    x = "Trophic index",
    y = "Transporter Bray-Curtis dissimilarity"
  ) +
  theme_nat()

blockA_fig <- (p_a | p_b) +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2, guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(blockA_fig)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "BlockA_nonaggregated_primary_aligned_models.png"),
  plot = blockA_fig,
  width = 10.5,
  height = 5.5,
  dpi = dpi_out,
  bg = "white"
)

############################################################
# 12) DIAGNOSTICS
############################################################

sim_tpf <- DHARMa::simulateResiduals(m_tpf_blockA, n = 500)
sim_bc  <- DHARMa::simulateResiduals(m_bc_blockA,  n = 500)

diag_table <- tibble(
  Model = c("TPF", "Bray-Curtis"),
  p_uniformity = c(
    tryCatch(DHARMa::testUniformity(sim_tpf)$p.value, error = function(e) NA_real_),
    tryCatch(DHARMa::testUniformity(sim_bc)$p.value,  error = function(e) NA_real_)
  ),
  p_dispersion = c(
    tryCatch(DHARMa::testDispersion(sim_tpf)$p.value, error = function(e) NA_real_),
    tryCatch(DHARMa::testDispersion(sim_bc)$p.value,  error = function(e) NA_real_)
  ),
  p_outliers = c(
    tryCatch(DHARMa::testOutliers(sim_tpf)$p.value, error = function(e) NA_real_),
    tryCatch(DHARMa::testOutliers(sim_bc)$p.value,  error = function(e) NA_real_)
  )
)

write.csv(
  diag_table,
  file = file.path(out_dir, "BlockA_model_diagnostics.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

############################################################
# 13) RENDERED SUMMARY TABLE
############################################################

model_table_portrait <- tibble(
  Metric = c(
    "Response",
    "Level",
    "Family",
    "Fixed effects",
    "Random effects",
    "N",
    "Trophic-index estimate",
    "Trophic-index SE",
    "Trophic-index p",
    "Marginal R²",
    "Conditional R²",
    "Key conclusion"
  ),
  `TPF model` = c(
    "Transporter proteome fraction",
    "Species × date",
    "Beta (logit)",
    "Trophic index + n dates + species-date protein recovery",
    "(1 | Phylum) + (1 | Species_ID)",
    as.character(model_table_raw$N[model_table_raw$Response == "Date-level TPF"]),
    fmt_num(model_table_raw$`TI estimate`[model_table_raw$Response == "Date-level TPF"], 3),
    fmt_num(model_table_raw$`TI SE`[model_table_raw$Response == "Date-level TPF"], 3),
    fmt_p(model_table_raw$`TI p`[model_table_raw$Response == "Date-level TPF"]),
    fmt_num(model_table_raw$`Marginal R2`[model_table_raw$Response == "Date-level TPF"], 3),
    fmt_num(model_table_raw$`Conditional R2`[model_table_raw$Response == "Date-level TPF"], 3),
    model_table_raw$`Key conclusion`[model_table_raw$Response == "Date-level TPF"]
  ),
  `Bray-Curtis model` = c(
    "Transporter Bray-Curtis dissimilarity",
    "Species × consecutive-date pair",
    "Gaussian on logit scale",
    "Trophic index + species-date protein recovery (paired consecutive dates)",
    "(1 | Phylum) + (1 | Species_ID)",
    as.character(model_table_raw$N[model_table_raw$Response == "Transition-level transporter Bray-Curtis"]),
    fmt_num(model_table_raw$`TI estimate`[model_table_raw$Response == "Transition-level transporter Bray-Curtis"], 3),
    fmt_num(model_table_raw$`TI SE`[model_table_raw$Response == "Transition-level transporter Bray-Curtis"], 3),
    fmt_p(model_table_raw$`TI p`[model_table_raw$Response == "Transition-level transporter Bray-Curtis"]),
    fmt_num(model_table_raw$`Marginal R2`[model_table_raw$Response == "Transition-level transporter Bray-Curtis"], 3),
    fmt_num(model_table_raw$`Conditional R2`[model_table_raw$Response == "Transition-level transporter Bray-Curtis"], 3),
    model_table_raw$`Key conclusion`[model_table_raw$Response == "Transition-level transporter Bray-Curtis"]
  )
)

write.csv(
  model_table_portrait,
  file = file.path(out_dir, "BlockA_nonaggregated_model_summary_portrait.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

model_table_gt <- model_table_portrait %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**Non-aggregated robustness model summary**"),
    subtitle = "Primary response definitions retained, fitted at the native observation level"
  ) %>%
  cols_align(
    align = "left",
    columns = Metric
  ) %>%
  cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = c(`TPF model`, `Bray-Curtis model`)
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    Metric = "",
    `TPF model` = "TPF (beta)",
    `Bray-Curtis model` = "Bray–Curtis (Gaussian)"
  ) %>%
  cols_width(
    Metric ~ px(260),
    `TPF model` ~ px(330),
    `Bray-Curtis model` ~ px(330)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
  ) %>%
  opt_row_striping() %>%
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = px(10.5),
    data_row.padding = px(6),
    column_labels.font.size = px(10.5),
    heading.title.font.size = px(13),
    heading.subtitle.font.size = px(10),
    source_notes.font.size = px(9),
    table.width = px(1050)
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = md(
      "Bray–Curtis dissimilarity was calculated from transporter-only KEGG intensity profiles between adjacent dates in each species’ filtered retained time series. In contrast to the primary cross-species models, these robustness models retain all species-level repeated observations and therefore include Species_ID as an additional random intercept."
    )
  )

print(model_table_gt)

gtsave(
  model_table_gt,
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "BlockA_nonaggregated_model_summary_portrait.png"),
  vwidth = 1200,
  vheight = 1500
)

gtsave(
  model_table_gt,
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "BlockA_nonaggregated_model_summary_portrait.html")
)

############################################################
# 14) CONSOLE SUMMARY
############################################################

cat("\nDone.\n")
cat("Outputs written to: ", out_dir, "\n", sep = "")
cat("\nKey checks:\n")
cat("- Bray-Curtis is calculated only between consecutive retained dates within each species.\n")
cat("- TPF uses the same transporter fraction definition as the primary model.\n")
cat("- Fixed-effect structure is matched to the primary models.\n")
cat("- Species_ID was added as a random effect because Block A retains repeated observations.\n\n")

cat("Rows used:\n")
cat("TPF species × date rows: ", nrow(species_date_tpf), "\n", sep = "")
cat("BC species × transition rows: ", nrow(transitions), "\n", sep = "")

cat("\nFiles:\n")
cat(file.path(out_dir, "BlockA_analysis_species_dates.csv"), "\n")
cat(file.path(out_dir, "BlockA_date_level_TPF_data.csv"), "\n")
cat(file.path(out_dir, "BlockA_transition_level_BrayCurtis_data.csv"), "\n")
cat(file.path(out_dir, "BlockA_nonaggregated_model_summary.csv"), "\n")
cat(file.path(out_dir, "BlockA_model_diagnostics.csv"), "\n")
cat(file.path(out_dir, "BlockA_nonaggregated_primary_aligned_models.png"), "\n")
cat(file.path(out_dir, "BlockA_nonaggregated_model_summary_portrait.png"), "\n")
```

```{r}
####################################################################################################
# BLOCK B — TAXONOMY ROBUSTNESS (FINAL TABLE FORMAT)
#
# PURPOSE
# -------
# Test whether the trophic-index associations for transporter proteome fraction (TPF) and
# transporter Bray–Curtis dissimilarity persist after accounting for phylum-level taxonomy,
# and whether the same association is retained when phylum is modeled as a fixed effect
# rather than a random effect.
#
# THIS VERSION
# ------------
# 1) keeps only:
#      - global phylum-adjusted models
#      - pooled within-phylum models
# 2) removes per-phylum models entirely
# 3) formats the summary table in the same portrait style as your other supplementary tables
# 4) handles R² explicitly:
#      - global mixed models: marginal + conditional R² from Nakagawa
#      - pooled within-phylum models: standard model R² only, reported as "Marginal R²";
#        "Conditional R²" is set to NA by design because there is no random-effect variance
#        component in those fixed-effect phylum models
#
# EXPECTED OBJECTS ALREADY IN MEMORY
# ----------------------------------
#   protein_final
#   retained_species
#   retained_species_dates
#   species_taxonomy
#
# OUTPUT
# ------
# Folder:
#   BlockB_Taxonomy_Robustness/
####################################################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(vegan)
  library(glmmTMB)
  library(performance)
  library(patchwork)
  library(scales)
  library(readr)
  library(gt)
  library(broom)
  library(broom.mixed)
})

set.seed(1)

############################################################
# 1) SETTINGS
############################################################

out_dir <- "BlockB_Taxonomy_Robustness"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

dpi_out <- 300
eps <- 1e-6
min_valid_dates_per_species <- 5

trophic_cols <- c(
  "Oligotroph"   = "#99C3E6",
  "Intermediate" = "#ECEAE9",
  "Copiotroph"   = "#B25009"
)

############################################################
# 2) BASIC CHECKS
############################################################

stopifnot(
  exists("protein_final"),
  exists("retained_species"),
  exists("retained_species_dates"),
  exists("species_taxonomy")
)

required_protein_cols <- c(
  "Species_ID", "Protein_ID", "Date", "Group_For_Plots",
  "TrophicIndex", "Protein_Abundance_IBAQ_Norm",
  "KEGG_Subcategory", "KEGG_ID"
)

required_species_cols <- c("Species_ID", "Group_For_Plots")
required_species_date_cols <- c("Species_ID", "Date", "Group_For_Plots")
required_tax_cols <- c("Species_ID", "Phylum", "Class")

stopifnot(all(required_protein_cols %in% names(protein_final)))
stopifnot(all(required_species_cols %in% names(retained_species)))
stopifnot(all(required_species_date_cols %in% names(retained_species_dates)))
stopifnot(all(required_tax_cols %in% names(species_taxonomy)))

protein_final <- protein_final %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date))

retained_species_dates <- retained_species_dates %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date))

species_taxonomy_use <- species_taxonomy %>%
  dplyr::select(Species_ID, Phylum, Class) %>%
  distinct()

############################################################
# 3) HELPERS
############################################################

theme_nat <- function(base_size = 11) {
  theme_bw(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 1),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = base_size - 1),
      axis.title = element_text(size = base_size),
      axis.text = element_text(size = base_size - 1, colour = "black"),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      legend.key = element_blank(),
      plot.margin = margin(6, 6, 6, 6)
    )
}

recode_plot_group <- function(x) {
  out <- dplyr::case_when(
    x == "Oligo_like"   ~ "Oligotroph",
    x == "Copio_like"   ~ "Copiotroph",
    x == "Intermediate" ~ "Intermediate",
    TRUE                ~ NA_character_
  )
  factor(out, levels = c("Oligotroph", "Intermediate", "Copiotroph"))
}

logit_bounded <- function(x, eps = 1e-6) {
  x2 <- pmin(pmax(x, eps), 1 - eps)
  qlogis(x2)
}

inv_logit <- function(x) {
  plogis(x)
}

scale_z <- function(x) {
  s <- sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (!is.finite(s) || s == 0) return(rep(0, length(x)))
  as.numeric(scale(x))
}

fmt_num_scalar <- function(x, digits = 3) {
  if (length(x) == 0 || is.na(x) || !is.finite(x)) return("NA")
  formatC(x, digits = digits, format = "fg", flag = "#")
}

fmt_p_scalar <- function(x) {
  if (length(x) == 0 || is.na(x) || !is.finite(x)) return("NA")
  if (x < 0.001) return("<0.001")
  formatC(x, digits = 3, format = "fg", flag = "#")
}

extract_glmmtmb_term <- function(model, term_name = "TrophicIndex_z") {
  sm <- summary(model)$coefficients$cond
  if (!term_name %in% rownames(sm)) {
    return(tibble(
      estimate = NA_real_,
      std_error = NA_real_,
      p_value = NA_real_
    ))
  }
  tibble(
    estimate  = unname(sm[term_name, "Estimate"]),
    std_error = unname(sm[term_name, "Std. Error"]),
    p_value   = unname(sm[term_name, "Pr(>|z|)"])
  )
}

safe_numeric <- function(x) {
  out <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  if (length(out) == 0 || all(is.na(out))) NA_real_ else out[1]
}

safe_r2_mixed <- function(model) {
  out <- c(Marginal_R2 = NA_real_, Conditional_R2 = NA_real_)

  r2_obj <- tryCatch(
    suppressWarnings(suppressMessages(performance::r2_nakagawa(model))),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (is.null(r2_obj)) return(out)

  if (is.atomic(r2_obj) && !is.null(names(r2_obj))) {
    if ("R2_marginal" %in% names(r2_obj)) {
      out["Marginal_R2"] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(r2_obj["R2_marginal"])[1])
    }
    if ("R2_conditional" %in% names(r2_obj)) {
      out["Conditional_R2"] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(r2_obj["R2_conditional"])[1])
    }
  }

  if (!is.atomic(r2_obj)) {
    if (!is.null(r2_obj$R2_marginal)) {
      out["Marginal_R2"] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(r2_obj$R2_marginal)[1])
    }
    if (!is.null(r2_obj$R2_conditional)) {
      out["Conditional_R2"] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(r2_obj$R2_conditional)[1])
    }
  }

  out
}

safe_r2_fixed <- function(model) {
  # For pooled within-phylum models without random effects,
  # use a generic model R² and report it as "Marginal R²".
  # Conditional R² is intentionally NA because there is no random-effect variance part.
  r2_obj <- tryCatch(
    suppressWarnings(suppressMessages(performance::r2(model))),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (is.null(r2_obj)) return(NA_real_)

  vals <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(r2_obj))
  vals <- vals[is.finite(vals)]
  if (length(vals) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  vals[1]
}

############################################################
# 4) BUILD SPECIES-LEVEL TPF DATA
############################################################

protein_flagged <- protein_final %>%
  mutate(
    is_transporter = !is.na(KEGG_Subcategory) &
      str_detect(KEGG_Subcategory, "\\bTransporters\\b"),
    abund = Protein_Abundance_IBAQ_Norm
  )

species_date_qc <- protein_flagged %>%
  semi_join(retained_species_dates, by = c("Species_ID", "Date")) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, Date) %>%
  summarise(
    N_prot_detected = n_distinct(Protein_ID),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

species_date_tpf <- protein_flagged %>%
  semi_join(retained_species_dates, by = c("Species_ID", "Date")) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, Date) %>%
  summarise(
    abund_total = sum(abund, na.rm = TRUE),
    abund_trans = sum(abund[is_transporter], na.rm = TRUE),
    TPF = abund_trans / abund_total,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(species_date_qc, by = c("Species_ID", "Date")) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(TPF),
    abund_total > 0,
    TPF > 0,
    TPF < 1
  )

species_traits <- protein_final %>%
  distinct(Species_ID, TrophicIndex, Group_For_Plots)

species_tpf_df <- species_date_tpf %>%
  left_join(species_traits, by = "Species_ID") %>%
  left_join(species_taxonomy_use, by = "Species_ID") %>%
  mutate(TrophicGroupPlot = recode_plot_group(Group_For_Plots)) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, TrophicIndex, Group_For_Plots, TrophicGroupPlot, Phylum, Class) %>%
  summarise(
    n_dates            = n(),
    mean_TPF           = mean(TPF, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_prot_detected = mean(N_prot_detected, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    n_dates >= min_valid_dates_per_species,
    is.finite(TrophicIndex),
    is.finite(mean_TPF),
    mean_TPF > 0,
    mean_TPF < 1,
    is.finite(mean_prot_detected),
    mean_prot_detected > 0,
    !is.na(TrophicGroupPlot),
    !is.na(Phylum),
    !is.na(Class)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    TrophicIndex_z      = scale_z(TrophicIndex),
    n_dates_z           = scale_z(n_dates),
    log_prot_detected_z = scale_z(log1p(mean_prot_detected)),
    Phylum              = factor(Phylum),
    Class               = factor(Class)
  )

write_csv(
  species_tpf_df,
  file.path(out_dir, "BlockB_species_level_TPF_data.csv")
)

############################################################
# 5) BUILD SPECIES-LEVEL TRANSPORTER BRAY-CURTIS DATA
############################################################

analysis_species_dates <- retained_species_dates %>%
  semi_join(retained_species, by = c("Species_ID", "Group_For_Plots")) %>%
  left_join(species_traits, by = c("Species_ID", "Group_For_Plots")) %>%
  left_join(species_taxonomy_use, by = "Species_ID") %>%
  mutate(TrophicGroupPlot = recode_plot_group(Group_For_Plots)) %>%
  distinct(Species_ID, Date, Group_For_Plots, TrophicIndex, TrophicGroupPlot, Phylum, Class) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(TrophicIndex),
    !is.na(TrophicGroupPlot),
    !is.na(Phylum),
    !is.na(Class)
  ) %>%
  arrange(Species_ID, Date)

prot_counts <- protein_final %>%
  semi_join(
    analysis_species_dates %>% select(Species_ID, Date),
    by = c("Species_ID", "Date")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, Date) %>%
  summarise(
    N_prot_detected = n_distinct(Protein_ID),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

analysis_species_dates <- analysis_species_dates %>%
  left_join(prot_counts, by = c("Species_ID", "Date"))

kegg_sd_trans <- protein_final %>%
  semi_join(
    analysis_species_dates %>% select(Species_ID, Date),
    by = c("Species_ID", "Date")
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(KEGG_ID),
    !is.na(KEGG_Subcategory),
    str_detect(KEGG_Subcategory, "\\bTransporters\\b")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, Date, KEGG_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    kegg_abund = sum(Protein_Abundance_IBAQ_Norm, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(kegg_abund), kegg_abund > 0)

compute_species_transitions_bc <- function(sp_id, keep_tbl, kegg_tbl) {

  dates_tbl <- keep_tbl %>%
    filter(Species_ID == sp_id) %>%
    arrange(Date)

  dates <- dates_tbl$Date
  if (length(dates) < 2) return(NULL)

  mat_wide <- kegg_tbl %>%
    filter(Species_ID == sp_id, Date %in% dates) %>%
    mutate(Date_chr = as.character(Date)) %>%
    select(Date_chr, KEGG_ID, kegg_abund) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = KEGG_ID,
      values_from = kegg_abund,
      values_fill = 0
    ) %>%
    arrange(Date_chr)

  if (nrow(mat_wide) < 2 || ncol(mat_wide) < 2) return(NULL)

  present_dates_chr <- mat_wide$Date_chr
  present_dates <- as.Date(present_dates_chr)

  M_abs <- as.matrix(mat_wide %>% select(-Date_chr))
  rownames(M_abs) <- present_dates_chr

  pair_tbl <- tibble(
    Date1 = present_dates[-length(present_dates)],
    Date2 = present_dates[-1]
  )

  out <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(pair_tbl)), function(i) {
    d1 <- as.character(pair_tbl$Date1[i])
    d2 <- as.character(pair_tbl$Date2[i])

    bc_abs <- as.numeric(
      vegan::vegdist(
        M_abs[c(d1, d2), , drop = FALSE],
        method = "bray"
      )
    )

    nd1 <- keep_tbl %>%
      filter(Species_ID == sp_id, Date == as.Date(d1)) %>%
      pull(N_prot_detected)

    nd2 <- keep_tbl %>%
      filter(Species_ID == sp_id, Date == as.Date(d2)) %>%
      pull(N_prot_detected)

    tibble(
      Species_ID  = sp_id,
      Date1       = as.Date(d1),
      Date2       = as.Date(d2),
      bc_abs      = bc_abs,
      N_prot_pair = mean(c(nd1, nd2), na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  })

  bind_rows(out)
}

all_species <- sort(unique(analysis_species_dates$Species_ID))

transitions <- bind_rows(lapply(
  all_species,
  compute_species_transitions_bc,
  keep_tbl = analysis_species_dates,
  kegg_tbl = kegg_sd_trans
)) %>%
  left_join(
    analysis_species_dates %>%
      distinct(Species_ID, TrophicIndex, Group_For_Plots, TrophicGroupPlot, Phylum, Class),
    by = "Species_ID"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(bc_abs),
    is.finite(N_prot_pair),
    !is.na(TrophicGroupPlot),
    !is.na(Phylum),
    !is.na(Class)
  )

species_bc_df <- transitions %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, TrophicIndex, Group_For_Plots, TrophicGroupPlot, Phylum, Class) %>%
  summarise(
    n_transitions  = n(),
    mean_bc_abs    = mean(bc_abs, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_prot_pair = mean(N_prot_pair, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(TrophicIndex),
    is.finite(mean_bc_abs),
    mean_bc_abs >= 0,
    mean_bc_abs <= 1,
    is.finite(mean_prot_pair),
    mean_prot_pair > 0,
    !is.na(TrophicGroupPlot),
    !is.na(Phylum),
    !is.na(Class)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    mean_bc_abs_logit = logit_bounded(mean_bc_abs, eps = eps),
    TrophicIndex_z    = scale_z(TrophicIndex),
    log_prot_pair_z   = scale_z(log1p(mean_prot_pair)),
    Phylum            = factor(Phylum),
    Class             = factor(Class)
  )

write_csv(
  species_bc_df,
  file.path(out_dir, "BlockB_species_level_transporter_BrayCurtis_data.csv")
)

############################################################
# 6) GLOBAL PHYLUM-ADJUSTED MODELS
############################################################

m_tpf_global <- glmmTMB(
  mean_TPF ~ TrophicIndex_z + n_dates_z + log_prot_detected_z + (1 | Phylum),
  family = beta_family(link = "logit"),
  data = species_tpf_df
)

m_bc_global <- glmmTMB(
  mean_bc_abs_logit ~ TrophicIndex_z + log_prot_pair_z + (1 | Phylum),
  family = gaussian(),
  data = species_bc_df
)

############################################################
# 7) WITHIN-PHYLUM POOLED MODELS
############################################################

m_tpf_within_pool <- glmmTMB(
  mean_TPF ~ TrophicIndex_z + n_dates_z + log_prot_detected_z + Phylum,
  family = beta_family(link = "logit"),
  data = species_tpf_df
)

m_bc_within_pool <- glmmTMB(
  mean_bc_abs_logit ~ TrophicIndex_z + log_prot_pair_z + Phylum,
  family = gaussian(),
  data = species_bc_df
)

############################################################
# 8) EXTRACT MODEL SUMMARIES
############################################################

fix_tpf_global <- extract_glmmtmb_term(m_tpf_global, "TrophicIndex_z")
fix_bc_global  <- extract_glmmtmb_term(m_bc_global, "TrophicIndex_z")

fix_tpf_within <- extract_glmmtmb_term(m_tpf_within_pool, "TrophicIndex_z")
fix_bc_within  <- extract_glmmtmb_term(m_bc_within_pool, "TrophicIndex_z")

r2_tpf_global <- safe_r2_mixed(m_tpf_global)
r2_bc_global  <- safe_r2_mixed(m_bc_global)

r2_tpf_within_marg <- safe_r2_fixed(m_tpf_within_pool)
r2_bc_within_marg  <- safe_r2_fixed(m_bc_within_pool)

global_pooled_tbl <- bind_rows(
  tibble(
    Response           = "Mean TPF",
    Model_name         = "TPF global",
    Taxonomy_test      = "Global phylum-adjusted model",
    Family             = "Beta (logit)",
    Fixed_effects      = "Trophic index + n dates + mean species protein recovery",
    Random_effects     = "(1 | Phylum)",
    N_species          = nrow(species_tpf_df),
    estimate           = fix_tpf_global$estimate,
    std_error          = fix_tpf_global$std_error,
    p_value            = fix_tpf_global$p_value,
    Marginal_R2        = safe_numeric(r2_tpf_global["Marginal_R2"]),
    Conditional_R2     = safe_numeric(r2_tpf_global["Conditional_R2"]),
    Interpretation     = "Trophic-index effect after accounting for phylum as random effect."
  ),
  tibble(
    Response           = "Mean TPF",
    Model_name         = "TPF pooled",
    Taxonomy_test      = "Within-phylum pooled model",
    Family             = "Beta (logit)",
    Fixed_effects      = "Trophic index + n dates + mean species protein recovery + Phylum",
    Random_effects     = "None",
    N_species          = nrow(species_tpf_df),
    estimate           = fix_tpf_within$estimate,
    std_error          = fix_tpf_within$std_error,
    p_value            = fix_tpf_within$p_value,
    Marginal_R2        = r2_tpf_within_marg,
    Conditional_R2     = NA_real_,
    Interpretation     = "Common trophic-index slope estimated while controlling for phylum as fixed effect."
  ),
  tibble(
    Response           = "Mean transporter Bray-Curtis",
    Model_name         = "BC global",
    Taxonomy_test      = "Global phylum-adjusted model",
    Family             = "Gaussian on logit scale",
    Fixed_effects      = "Trophic index + mean species protein recovery (paired consecutive dates)",
    Random_effects     = "(1 | Phylum)",
    N_species          = nrow(species_bc_df),
    estimate           = fix_bc_global$estimate,
    std_error          = fix_bc_global$std_error,
    p_value            = fix_bc_global$p_value,
    Marginal_R2        = safe_numeric(r2_bc_global["Marginal_R2"]),
    Conditional_R2     = safe_numeric(r2_bc_global["Conditional_R2"]),
    Interpretation     = "Trophic-index effect after accounting for phylum as random effect."
  ),
  tibble(
    Response           = "Mean transporter Bray-Curtis",
    Model_name         = "BC pooled",
    Taxonomy_test      = "Within-phylum pooled model",
    Family             = "Gaussian on logit scale",
    Fixed_effects      = "Trophic index + mean species protein recovery (paired consecutive dates) + Phylum",
    Random_effects     = "None",
    N_species          = nrow(species_bc_df),
    estimate           = fix_bc_within$estimate,
    std_error          = fix_bc_within$std_error,
    p_value            = fix_bc_within$p_value,
    Marginal_R2        = r2_bc_within_marg,
    Conditional_R2     = NA_real_,
    Interpretation     = "Common trophic-index slope estimated while controlling for phylum as fixed effect."
  )
)

write_csv(
  global_pooled_tbl,
  file.path(out_dir, "BlockB_global_and_withinphylum_models.csv")
)

############################################################
# 9) BUILD PREDICTION CURVES
############################################################

pred_tpf_within <- tibble(
  TrophicIndex = seq(
    min(species_tpf_df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE),
    max(species_tpf_df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE),
    length.out = 300
  )
) %>%
  mutate(
    TrophicIndex_z      = (TrophicIndex - mean(species_tpf_df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE)) /
      sd(species_tpf_df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_dates_z           = 0,
    log_prot_detected_z = 0,
    Phylum              = factor(levels(species_tpf_df$Phylum)[1], levels = levels(species_tpf_df$Phylum))
  )

pred_tpf_within$fit <- predict(
  m_tpf_within_pool,
  newdata = pred_tpf_within,
  type = "response"
)

pred_bc_within <- tibble(
  TrophicIndex = seq(
    min(species_bc_df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE),
    max(species_bc_df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE),
    length.out = 300
  )
) %>%
  mutate(
    TrophicIndex_z  = (TrophicIndex - mean(species_bc_df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE)) /
      sd(species_bc_df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE),
    log_prot_pair_z = 0,
    Phylum          = factor(levels(species_bc_df$Phylum)[1], levels = levels(species_bc_df$Phylum))
  )

pred_bc_within$fit_logit <- predict(
  m_bc_within_pool,
  newdata = pred_bc_within,
  type = "response"
)

pred_bc_within <- pred_bc_within %>%
  mutate(fit_bc_raw = inv_logit(fit_logit))

############################################################
# 10) FIGURE — WITHIN-PHYLUM POOLED FITS
############################################################

p_tpf_within <- ggplot(
  species_tpf_df,
  aes(x = TrophicIndex, y = mean_TPF, fill = TrophicGroupPlot)
) +
  geom_point(
    shape = 21,
    colour = "black",
    size = 2.1,
    stroke = 0.25,
    alpha = 0.90
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = pred_tpf_within,
    aes(x = TrophicIndex, y = fit),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 1,
    colour = "black"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Phylum, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = trophic_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = number_format(accuracy = 0.01)) +
  labs(
    title = "Block B | Within-phylum transporter allocation",
    subtitle = "Species-level mean TPF with pooled within-phylum trophic-index fit",
    x = "Trophic index",
    y = "Mean transporter proteome fraction"
  ) +
  theme_nat(base_size = 10)

p_bc_within <- ggplot(
  species_bc_df,
  aes(x = TrophicIndex, y = mean_bc_abs, fill = TrophicGroupPlot)
) +
  geom_point(
    shape = 21,
    colour = "black",
    size = 2.1,
    stroke = 0.25,
    alpha = 0.90
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = pred_bc_within,
    aes(x = TrophicIndex, y = fit_bc_raw),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 1,
    colour = "black"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Phylum, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = trophic_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = number_format(accuracy = 0.01)) +
  labs(
    title = "Block B | Within-phylum transporter variability",
    subtitle = "Species-level mean transporter Bray–Curtis with pooled within-phylum trophic-index fit",
    x = "Trophic index",
    y = "Mean transporter Bray–Curtis dissimilarity"
  ) +
  theme_nat(base_size = 10)

blockB_fit_fig <- p_tpf_within / p_bc_within

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "BlockB_within_phylum_fits.png"),
  plot = blockB_fit_fig,
  width = 12,
  height = 10,
  dpi = dpi_out,
  bg = "white"
)

############################################################
# 11) SUMMARY TABLE — SAME PORTRAIT STYLE AS OTHER TABLES
############################################################

table_rows <- tibble(
  Metric = c(
    "Response",
    "Family",
    "Fixed effects",
    "Random effects",
    "N",
    "Trophic-index estimate",
    "Trophic-index SE",
    "Trophic-index p",
    "Marginal R²",
    "Conditional R²",
    "Key conclusion"
  ),
  `TPF global` = c(
    global_pooled_tbl$Response[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF global"],
    global_pooled_tbl$Family[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF global"],
    global_pooled_tbl$Fixed_effects[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF global"],
    global_pooled_tbl$Random_effects[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF global"],
    as.character(global_pooled_tbl$N_species[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF global"]),
    fmt_num_scalar(global_pooled_tbl$estimate[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF global"], 3),
    fmt_num_scalar(global_pooled_tbl$std_error[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF global"], 3),
    fmt_p_scalar(global_pooled_tbl$p_value[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF global"]),
    fmt_num_scalar(global_pooled_tbl$Marginal_R2[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF global"], 3),
    fmt_num_scalar(global_pooled_tbl$Conditional_R2[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF global"], 3),
    global_pooled_tbl$Interpretation[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF global"]
  ),
  `TPF pooled within-phylum` = c(
    global_pooled_tbl$Response[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF pooled"],
    global_pooled_tbl$Family[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF pooled"],
    global_pooled_tbl$Fixed_effects[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF pooled"],
    global_pooled_tbl$Random_effects[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF pooled"],
    as.character(global_pooled_tbl$N_species[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF pooled"]),
    fmt_num_scalar(global_pooled_tbl$estimate[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF pooled"], 3),
    fmt_num_scalar(global_pooled_tbl$std_error[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF pooled"], 3),
    fmt_p_scalar(global_pooled_tbl$p_value[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF pooled"]),
    fmt_num_scalar(global_pooled_tbl$Marginal_R2[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF pooled"], 3),
    fmt_num_scalar(global_pooled_tbl$Conditional_R2[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF pooled"], 3),
    global_pooled_tbl$Interpretation[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "TPF pooled"]
  ),
  `Bray-Curtis global` = c(
    global_pooled_tbl$Response[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC global"],
    global_pooled_tbl$Family[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC global"],
    global_pooled_tbl$Fixed_effects[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC global"],
    global_pooled_tbl$Random_effects[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC global"],
    as.character(global_pooled_tbl$N_species[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC global"]),
    fmt_num_scalar(global_pooled_tbl$estimate[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC global"], 3),
    fmt_num_scalar(global_pooled_tbl$std_error[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC global"], 3),
    fmt_p_scalar(global_pooled_tbl$p_value[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC global"]),
    fmt_num_scalar(global_pooled_tbl$Marginal_R2[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC global"], 3),
    fmt_num_scalar(global_pooled_tbl$Conditional_R2[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC global"], 3),
    global_pooled_tbl$Interpretation[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC global"]
  ),
  `Bray-Curtis pooled within-phylum` = c(
    global_pooled_tbl$Response[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC pooled"],
    global_pooled_tbl$Family[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC pooled"],
    global_pooled_tbl$Fixed_effects[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC pooled"],
    global_pooled_tbl$Random_effects[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC pooled"],
    as.character(global_pooled_tbl$N_species[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC pooled"]),
    fmt_num_scalar(global_pooled_tbl$estimate[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC pooled"], 3),
    fmt_num_scalar(global_pooled_tbl$std_error[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC pooled"], 3),
    fmt_p_scalar(global_pooled_tbl$p_value[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC pooled"]),
    fmt_num_scalar(global_pooled_tbl$Marginal_R2[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC pooled"], 3),
    fmt_num_scalar(global_pooled_tbl$Conditional_R2[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC pooled"], 3),
    global_pooled_tbl$Interpretation[global_pooled_tbl$Model_name == "BC pooled"]
  )
)

write_csv(
  table_rows,
  file.path(out_dir, "BlockB_taxonomy_robustness_summary_table_portrait.csv")
)

summary_table_gt <- table_rows %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**Taxonomy robustness of trophic-index associations**"),
    subtitle = "Global phylum-adjusted and pooled within-phylum model summaries"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    Metric = "",
    `TPF global` = "TPF (global)",
    `TPF pooled within-phylum` = "TPF (pooled within-phylum)",
    `Bray-Curtis global` = "Bray–Curtis (global)",
    `Bray-Curtis pooled within-phylum` = "Bray–Curtis (pooled within-phylum)"
  ) %>%
  cols_align(
    align = "left",
    columns = Metric
  ) %>%
  cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = c(
      `TPF global`,
      `TPF pooled within-phylum`,
      `Bray-Curtis global`,
      `Bray-Curtis pooled within-phylum`
    )
  ) %>%
  cols_width(
    Metric ~ px(240),
    `TPF global` ~ px(235),
    `TPF pooled within-phylum` ~ px(260),
    `Bray-Curtis global` ~ px(235),
    `Bray-Curtis pooled within-phylum` ~ px(270)
  ) %>%
  opt_row_striping() %>%
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = px(10),
    data_row.padding = px(5),
    column_labels.font.size = px(10),
    heading.title.font.size = px(13),
    heading.subtitle.font.size = px(10)
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = md(
      "Global phylum-adjusted models estimate the trophic-index effect after accounting for phylum as a random intercept. Pooled within-phylum models instead include phylum as a fixed effect, so the trophic-index slope is estimated from within-phylum structure. For the pooled models, conditional R² is not applicable because no random-effect variance component is modeled."
    )
  )

print(summary_table_gt)

gtsave(
  summary_table_gt,
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "BlockB_taxonomy_robustness_summary_table_portrait.png"),
  vwidth = 1700,
  vheight = 1200
)

gtsave(
  summary_table_gt,
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "BlockB_taxonomy_robustness_summary_table_portrait.html")
)

############################################################
# 12) CONSOLE SUMMARY
############################################################

cat("\nDone.\n")
cat("Outputs written to: ", out_dir, "\n", sep = "")
cat("\nResponses analysed:\n")
cat("- Species-level mean transporter proteome fraction (TPF)\n")
cat("- Species-level mean transporter Bray–Curtis dissimilarity\n\n")

cat("Files:\n")
cat(file.path(out_dir, "BlockB_species_level_TPF_data.csv"), "\n")
cat(file.path(out_dir, "BlockB_species_level_transporter_BrayCurtis_data.csv"), "\n")
cat(file.path(out_dir, "BlockB_global_and_withinphylum_models.csv"), "\n")
cat(file.path(out_dir, "BlockB_taxonomy_robustness_summary_table_portrait.csv"), "\n")
cat(file.path(out_dir, "BlockB_within_phylum_fits.png"), "\n")
cat(file.path(out_dir, "BlockB_taxonomy_robustness_summary_table_portrait.png"), "\n")
```



```{r}
####################################################################################################
# FINAL UNIFIED FUNCTIONAL SPECIFICITY ANALYSIS
#
# PURPOSE
# -------
# Test whether trophic-index effects on temporal variability are concentrated in
# resource-acquisition functions rather than reflecting a general property of species abundance,
# total proteome structure, or other broad proteome categories.
#
# THIS VERSION
# ------------
# - keeps the same analysis backbone
# - EXCLUDES the separate transporter-only model from the final summary table
# - renders the summary table in PORTRAIT format:
#       columns = analysis spaces
#       rows    = model parameters / interpretation fields
# - explicitly reports:
#       * response
#       * model family
#       * fixed effects
#       * random effects
#       * N species
#       * trophic-index estimate / CI / p
#       * exp(beta)
#       * marginal and conditional R²
#       * TI10 -> TI90 response change
#
# EXPECTED OBJECTS ALREADY IN MEMORY
# ----------------------------------
#   protein_final
#   retained_species
#   retained_species_dates
#   species_taxonomy
#   species_abundance
#
# OUTPUT
# ------
# Folder:
#   Final_Unified_FunctionalSpecificity/
####################################################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(tibble)
  library(purrr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(vegan)
  library(glmmTMB)
  library(broom)
  library(broom.mixed)
  library(performance)
  library(patchwork)
  library(gt)
  library(grid)
})

set.seed(1)

####################################################################################################
# 0) SETTINGS
####################################################################################################

abundance_col <- "Protein_Abundance_IBAQ_Norm"

min_proteins_per_date_global <- 10
min_valid_dates_per_species_global <- 5

min_features_per_date_analysis <- 1
min_valid_dates_per_species_analysis <- 5

transporter_regex <- "\\bTransporters\\b"
eps <- 1e-6

# Full analysis order for model fitting / figures
analysis_order <- c(
  "Species abundance",
  "Total proteome",
  "Growth machinery",
  "Core metabolism/biosynthesis",
  "Resource acquisition",
  "Transporters"
)

# Table order excludes transporters
table_analysis_order <- c(
  "Species abundance",
  "Total proteome",
  "Growth machinery",
  "Core metabolism/biosynthesis",
  "Resource acquisition"
)

trophic_levels <- c("Oligo_like", "Intermediate", "Copio_like")
trophic_cols <- c(
  "Oligo_like"   = "#93C2E6",
  "Intermediate" = "#EDEAE9",
  "Copio_like"   = "#BA5205"
)

outdir <- "Final_Unified_FunctionalSpecificity"
dir.create(outdir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

####################################################################################################
# 1) BASIC CHECKS
####################################################################################################

stopifnot(
  exists("protein_final"),
  exists("retained_species"),
  exists("retained_species_dates"),
  exists("species_taxonomy"),
  exists("species_abundance")
)

stopifnot(
  all(c("Species_ID", "Date", "Protein_ID", "Group_For_Plots", "TrophicIndex") %in% names(protein_final)),
  all(c("Species_ID", "Date", "Group_For_Plots") %in% names(retained_species_dates)),
  all(c("Species_ID") %in% names(retained_species)),
  all(c("Species_ID", "Phylum") %in% names(species_taxonomy)),
  all(c("Species_ID", "Date", "Species_Abundance") %in% names(species_abundance))
)

protein_final <- protein_final %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date))

retained_species_dates <- retained_species_dates %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date))

species_abundance <- species_abundance %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date))

####################################################################################################
# 2) HELPERS
####################################################################################################

fmt_p_scalar <- function(p) {
  if (length(p) == 0 || is.na(p) || !is.finite(p)) return("NA")
  if (p < 1e-4) return("<1e-4")
  if (p < 1e-3) return("<0.001")
  formatC(p, format = "e", digits = 2)
}

fmt_num_scalar <- function(x, digits = 2) {
  if (length(x) == 0 || is.na(x) || !is.finite(x)) return("NA")
  formatC(x, digits = digits, format = "f")
}

fmt_p <- function(x) vapply(x, fmt_p_scalar, character(1))
fmt_num <- function(x, digits = 2) vapply(x, fmt_num_scalar, character(1), digits = digits)

logit01 <- function(x, eps = 1e-6) {
  x2 <- pmin(pmax(x, eps), 1 - eps)
  qlogis(x2)
}

safe_scale <- function(x) {
  s <- sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (!is.finite(s) || s == 0) {
    rep(0, length(x))
  } else {
    as.numeric(scale(x))
  }
}

theme_nature_clean <- function(base_size = 11) {
  theme_bw(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank()
    )
}

safe_r2_vals <- function(model) {
  out <- c(Marginal_R2 = NA_real_, Conditional_R2 = NA_real_)

  r2_obj <- tryCatch(
    suppressWarnings(suppressMessages(performance::r2_nakagawa(model))),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (is.null(r2_obj)) return(out)

  if (is.atomic(r2_obj) && !is.null(names(r2_obj))) {
    if ("R2_marginal" %in% names(r2_obj)) {
      out["Marginal_R2"] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(r2_obj["R2_marginal"])[1])
    }
    if ("R2_conditional" %in% names(r2_obj)) {
      out["Conditional_R2"] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(r2_obj["R2_conditional"])[1])
    }
  }

  if (!is.atomic(r2_obj)) {
    if (!is.null(r2_obj$R2_marginal)) {
      out["Marginal_R2"] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(r2_obj$R2_marginal)[1])
    }
    if (!is.null(r2_obj$R2_conditional)) {
      out["Conditional_R2"] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(r2_obj$R2_conditional)[1])
    }
  }

  out
}

####################################################################################################
# 3) EXPLICIT FUNCTIONAL CATEGORY LABELS
####################################################################################################

growth_labels <- c(
  "Ribosome",
  "Ribosome biogenesis",
  "Translation factors",
  "Transfer RNA biogenesis",
  "Messenger RNA biogenesis",
  "Chaperones and folding catalysts",
  "Exosome",
  "Proteasome",
  "Ubiquitin system",
  "Mitochondrial biogenesis"
)

resource_labels <- c(
  "Secretion system",
  "Two-component system",
  "Membrane trafficking",
  "Ion channels",
  "Lectins"
)

core_labels <- c(
  "Enzymes",
  "Amino acid related enzymes",
  "Lipid biosynthesis proteins",
  "Lipopolysaccharide biosynthesis proteins",
  "Glycosyltransferases",
  "Polyketide biosynthesis proteins",
  "Prenyltransferases",
  "Cytochrome P450",
  "Peptidoglycan biosynthesis and degradation proteins",
  "Photosynthesis proteins"
)

####################################################################################################
# 4) RECONSTRUCT SHARED RETAINED UNIVERSE
####################################################################################################

retained_keys <- retained_species_dates %>%
  distinct(Species_ID, Date, Group_For_Plots)

protein_final_u <- protein_final %>%
  semi_join(retained_keys, by = c("Species_ID", "Date", "Group_For_Plots")) %>%
  semi_join(retained_species %>% distinct(Species_ID), by = "Species_ID")

species_abundance_u <- species_abundance %>%
  semi_join(retained_species_dates %>% distinct(Species_ID, Date), by = c("Species_ID", "Date")) %>%
  semi_join(retained_species %>% distinct(Species_ID), by = "Species_ID")

species_meta <- protein_final_u %>%
  distinct(Species_ID, TrophicIndex, TrophicGroup, Group_For_Plots) %>%
  mutate(
    TrophicGroup = case_when(
      Group_For_Plots %in% trophic_levels ~ Group_For_Plots,
      TrophicGroup %in% trophic_levels ~ TrophicGroup,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  distinct(Species_ID, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  left_join(
    species_taxonomy %>%
      distinct(Species_ID, Phylum, Class, Order, Family, Genus, Species),
    by = "Species_ID"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(TrophicIndex),
    !is.na(TrophicGroup),
    !is.na(Phylum),
    !is.na(Class)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    TrophicGroup = factor(TrophicGroup, levels = trophic_levels),
    Phylum = factor(Phylum),
    Class = factor(Class)
  )

####################################################################################################
# 5) GLOBAL QC
####################################################################################################

species_date_qc <- protein_final_u %>%
  mutate(
    is_transporter = !is.na(KEGG_Subcategory) & str_detect(KEGG_Subcategory, transporter_regex)
  ) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID, Date) %>%
  summarise(
    N_prot_detected = n_distinct(Protein_ID),
    has_transporter = any(is_transporter, na.rm = TRUE),
    has_nontrans = any(!is_transporter, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    N_prot_detected >= min_proteins_per_date_global,
    has_transporter,
    has_nontrans
  )

species_keep_global <- species_date_qc %>%
  count(Species_ID, name = "n_dates_global") %>%
  filter(n_dates_global >= min_valid_dates_per_species_global)

species_date_keep_global <- species_date_qc %>%
  semi_join(species_keep_global, by = "Species_ID") %>%
  inner_join(species_meta, by = "Species_ID") %>%
  mutate(Species_ID = factor(Species_ID))

cat("\n=== Shared global QC universe ===\n")
cat("QC-passed species×dates:", nrow(species_date_keep_global), "\n")
cat("QC-passed species:", dplyr::n_distinct(species_date_keep_global$Species_ID), "\n")

####################################################################################################
# 6) FULL DATA PREPARATION
####################################################################################################

protein_base <- protein_final_u %>%
  inner_join(
    species_date_keep_global %>% select(Species_ID, Date),
    by = c("Species_ID", "Date")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    KEGG_ID = if_else(is.na(KEGG_ID) | KEGG_ID == "", NA_character_, KEGG_ID),
    is_transporter = !is.na(KEGG_Subcategory) & str_detect(KEGG_Subcategory, transporter_regex)
  ) %>%
  distinct(Species_ID, Date, Protein_ID, KEGG_ID, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(row_id = row_number())

protein_labels_long <- protein_base %>%
  transmute(
    row_id,
    Species_ID,
    Date,
    Protein_ID,
    KEGG_ID,
    is_transporter,
    KEGG_Subcategory = if_else(
      is.na(KEGG_Subcategory) | trimws(KEGG_Subcategory) == "",
      "Unannotated",
      KEGG_Subcategory
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    KEGG_Subcategory = str_replace_all(KEGG_Subcategory, "\\s*;\\s*", ";")
  ) %>%
  separate_rows(KEGG_Subcategory, sep = ";") %>%
  mutate(
    Label = trimws(KEGG_Subcategory),
    Label = if_else(is.na(Label) | Label == "", "Unannotated", Label)
  )

protein_category_flags <- protein_labels_long %>%
  group_by(row_id) %>%
  summarise(
    is_growth = any(Label %in% growth_labels, na.rm = TRUE),
    is_core = any(Label %in% core_labels, na.rm = TRUE),
    is_resource_nontrans = any(Label %in% resource_labels, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

protein_processed <- protein_base %>%
  left_join(protein_category_flags, by = "row_id") %>%
  mutate(
    is_growth = if_else(is.na(is_growth), FALSE, is_growth),
    is_core = if_else(is.na(is_core), FALSE, is_core),
    is_resource_nontrans = if_else(is.na(is_resource_nontrans), FALSE, is_resource_nontrans),
    is_resource_any = is_transporter | is_resource_nontrans,
    n_split_categories = as.integer(is_growth) +
      as.integer(is_core) +
      as.integer(is_resource_any),
    w_growth = if_else(is_growth & n_split_categories > 0, 1 / n_split_categories, 0),
    w_core = if_else(is_core & n_split_categories > 0, 1 / n_split_categories, 0),
    w_resource = if_else(is_resource_any & n_split_categories > 0, 1 / n_split_categories, 0),
    w_transporters = if_else(is_transporter, 1, 0)
  )

####################################################################################################
# 7) BUILD ANALYSIS-READY FEATURE TABLES
####################################################################################################

build_feature_table <- function(mode) {

  if (mode == "species_abundance") {
    return(
      species_abundance_u %>%
        inner_join(
          species_date_keep_global %>% select(Species_ID, Date),
          by = c("Species_ID", "Date")
        ) %>%
        filter(is.finite(Species_Abundance), Species_Abundance > 0) %>%
        transmute(
          Species_ID,
          Date,
          Feature_ID = "Species_Abundance",
          abundance = Species_Abundance
        )
    )
  }

  if (mode == "total_proteome") {
    return(
      protein_processed %>%
        filter(!is.na(KEGG_ID)) %>%
        group_by(Species_ID, Date, KEGG_ID) %>%
        summarise(
          abundance = sum(.data[[abundance_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
          .groups = "drop"
        ) %>%
        filter(is.finite(abundance), abundance > 0) %>%
        rename(Feature_ID = KEGG_ID)
    )
  }

  if (mode == "growth_machinery") {
    return(
      protein_processed %>%
        filter(!is.na(KEGG_ID), w_growth > 0) %>%
        group_by(Species_ID, Date, KEGG_ID) %>%
        summarise(
          abundance = sum(.data[[abundance_col]] * w_growth, na.rm = TRUE),
          .groups = "drop"
        ) %>%
        filter(is.finite(abundance), abundance > 0) %>%
        rename(Feature_ID = KEGG_ID)
    )
  }

  if (mode == "core_metabolism") {
    return(
      protein_processed %>%
        filter(!is.na(KEGG_ID), w_core > 0) %>%
        group_by(Species_ID, Date, KEGG_ID) %>%
        summarise(
          abundance = sum(.data[[abundance_col]] * w_core, na.rm = TRUE),
          .groups = "drop"
        ) %>%
        filter(is.finite(abundance), abundance > 0) %>%
        rename(Feature_ID = KEGG_ID)
    )
  }

  if (mode == "resource_acquisition") {
    return(
      protein_processed %>%
        filter(!is.na(KEGG_ID), w_resource > 0) %>%
        group_by(Species_ID, Date, KEGG_ID) %>%
        summarise(
          abundance = sum(.data[[abundance_col]] * w_resource, na.rm = TRUE),
          .groups = "drop"
        ) %>%
        filter(is.finite(abundance), abundance > 0) %>%
        rename(Feature_ID = KEGG_ID)
    )
  }

  if (mode == "transporters") {
    return(
      protein_processed %>%
        filter(!is.na(KEGG_ID), w_transporters > 0) %>%
        group_by(Species_ID, Date, KEGG_ID) %>%
        summarise(
          abundance = sum(.data[[abundance_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
          .groups = "drop"
        ) %>%
        filter(is.finite(abundance), abundance > 0) %>%
        rename(Feature_ID = KEGG_ID)
    )
  }

  stop("Unknown mode: ", mode)
}

####################################################################################################
# 8) BUILD ANALYSIS-SPECIFIC KEEP TABLE
####################################################################################################

build_analysis_keep_tbl <- function(feature_tbl, analysis_label) {

  date_feature_counts <- feature_tbl %>%
    group_by(Species_ID, Date) %>%
    summarise(
      n_features = n_distinct(Feature_ID),
      total_abund = sum(abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(
      n_features >= min_features_per_date_analysis,
      is.finite(total_abund),
      total_abund > 0
    )

  keep_tbl <- species_date_keep_global %>%
    inner_join(date_feature_counts, by = c("Species_ID", "Date")) %>%
    group_by(Species_ID) %>%
    mutate(n_dates_analysis = n()) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    filter(n_dates_analysis >= min_valid_dates_per_species_analysis) %>%
    mutate(
      Analysis = analysis_label,
      Species_ID = factor(Species_ID),
      TrophicGroup = factor(TrophicGroup, levels = trophic_levels),
      Phylum = factor(Phylum)
    )

  keep_tbl
}

####################################################################################################
# 9) COMPUTE CONSECUTIVE-DATE BRAY–CURTIS DISSIMILARITY
####################################################################################################

compute_transitions_bc <- function(feature_tbl, keep_tbl, analysis_label) {

  valid_species <- keep_tbl %>%
    distinct(Species_ID) %>%
    pull(Species_ID) %>%
    as.character()

  out <- lapply(valid_species, function(sp_id_chr) {

    dates <- keep_tbl %>%
      filter(as.character(Species_ID) == sp_id_chr) %>%
      distinct(Date) %>%
      arrange(Date) %>%
      pull(Date)

    if (length(dates) < 2) return(NULL)

    mat_wide <- feature_tbl %>%
      filter(as.character(Species_ID) == sp_id_chr, Date %in% dates) %>%
      mutate(Date = as.character(Date)) %>%
      pivot_wider(
        names_from = Feature_ID,
        values_from = abundance,
        values_fill = 0
      ) %>%
      arrange(match(Date, as.character(dates)))

    M <- as.matrix(mat_wide %>% select(-Species_ID, -Date))
    rownames(M) <- mat_wide$Date

    if (nrow(M) < 2) return(NULL)

    pairs <- tibble(
      Date1 = dates[-length(dates)],
      Date2 = dates[-1]
    )

    bind_rows(lapply(seq_len(nrow(pairs)), function(i) {
      d1 <- as.character(pairs$Date1[i])
      d2 <- as.character(pairs$Date2[i])

      bc <- as.numeric(vegdist(M[c(d1, d2), , drop = FALSE], method = "bray"))

      nd1 <- keep_tbl %>%
        filter(as.character(Species_ID) == sp_id_chr, Date == pairs$Date1[i]) %>%
        pull(N_prot_detected)

      nd2 <- keep_tbl %>%
        filter(as.character(Species_ID) == sp_id_chr, Date == pairs$Date2[i]) %>%
        pull(N_prot_detected)

      nf1 <- keep_tbl %>%
        filter(as.character(Species_ID) == sp_id_chr, Date == pairs$Date1[i]) %>%
        pull(n_features)

      nf2 <- keep_tbl %>%
        filter(as.character(Species_ID) == sp_id_chr, Date == pairs$Date2[i]) %>%
        pull(n_features)

      tibble(
        Analysis = analysis_label,
        Species_ID = sp_id_chr,
        Date1 = pairs$Date1[i],
        Date2 = pairs$Date2[i],
        BrayCurtis = bc,
        N_prot_pair = mean(c(nd1, nd2), na.rm = TRUE),
        N_feat_pair = mean(c(nf1, nf2), na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    }))
  })

  bind_rows(out) %>%
    left_join(
      keep_tbl %>%
        mutate(Species_ID_chr = as.character(Species_ID)) %>%
        distinct(Species_ID_chr, TrophicIndex, TrophicGroup, Phylum),
      by = c("Species_ID" = "Species_ID_chr")
    ) %>%
    filter(is.finite(BrayCurtis), is.finite(TrophicIndex)) %>%
    mutate(
      BC_logit = logit01(BrayCurtis, eps = eps),
      log_prot_pair = log1p(N_prot_pair),
      log_feat_pair = log1p(N_feat_pair),
      TrophicIndex_z = safe_scale(TrophicIndex),
      log_prot_pair_z = safe_scale(log_prot_pair),
      log_feat_pair_z = safe_scale(log_feat_pair),
      TrophicGroup = factor(TrophicGroup, levels = trophic_levels),
      Species_ID = factor(Species_ID),
      Phylum = factor(Phylum)
    ) %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(Species_ID),
      !is.na(Phylum),
      is.finite(BC_logit),
      is.finite(TrophicIndex_z)
    ) %>%
    droplevels()
}

####################################################################################################
# 10) SUMMARISE TO SPECIES-LEVEL VARIABILITY
####################################################################################################

summarise_species_variability <- function(transitions_tbl) {
  transitions_tbl %>%
    group_by(Analysis, Species_ID, TrophicIndex, TrophicGroup, Phylum) %>%
    summarise(
      n_transitions = n(),
      mean_bc = mean(BrayCurtis, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_bc = median(BrayCurtis, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_N_prot_pair = mean(N_prot_pair, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_N_feat_pair = mean(N_feat_pair, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      mean_bc_logit = logit01(mean_bc, eps = eps),
      median_bc_logit = logit01(median_bc, eps = eps),
      log_prot_pair = log1p(mean_N_prot_pair),
      log_feat_pair = log1p(mean_N_feat_pair),
      TrophicIndex_z = safe_scale(TrophicIndex),
      n_transitions_z = safe_scale(n_transitions),
```
