```{r}
      log_prot_pair_z = safe_scale(log_prot_pair),
      log_feat_pair_z = safe_scale(log_feat_pair),
      TrophicGroup = factor(TrophicGroup, levels = trophic_levels),
      Phylum = factor(Phylum)
    )
}

####################################################################################################
# 11) SPECIES-LEVEL MODEL FITTER
####################################################################################################

fit_species_model_safe <- function(df, response_col = "mean_bc_logit") {

  model_df <- df %>%
    filter(
      is.finite(.data[[response_col]]),
      is.finite(TrophicIndex_z),
      is.finite(n_transitions_z),
      is.finite(log_prot_pair_z),
      !is.na(Phylum)
    ) %>%
    mutate(Phylum = factor(Phylum)) %>%
    droplevels()

  if (nrow(model_df) < 8) {
    stop("Too few rows to fit model.")
  }

  rhs <- "TrophicIndex_z + n_transitions_z + log_prot_pair_z"

  if (nlevels(model_df$Phylum) >= 2) {
    mixed_formula <- as.formula(
      paste(response_col, "~", rhs, "+ (1 | Phylum)")
    )

    mixed_try <- tryCatch(
      glmmTMB(
        formula = mixed_formula,
        family = gaussian(),
        data = model_df
      ),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    if (!is.null(mixed_try)) {
      return(list(
        model = mixed_try,
        model_class = "glmmTMB",
        data_used = model_df,
        response_col = response_col,
        fixed_effects_text = "Trophic index + n transitions + mean species protein recovery (paired consecutive dates)",
        random_effects_text = "(1 | Phylum)",
        family_text = "Gaussian on logit scale"
      ))
    }
  }

  lm_formula <- if (nlevels(model_df$Phylum) >= 2) {
    as.formula(paste(response_col, "~", rhs, "+ Phylum"))
  } else {
    as.formula(paste(response_col, "~", rhs))
  }

  lm_fit <- lm(lm_formula, data = model_df)

  list(
    model = lm_fit,
    model_class = "lm",
    data_used = model_df,
    response_col = response_col,
    fixed_effects_text = "Trophic index + n transitions + mean species protein recovery (paired consecutive dates) + Phylum",
    random_effects_text = "None (linear-model fallback)",
    family_text = "Gaussian on logit scale"
  )
}

####################################################################################################
# 12) EXTRACT MODEL STATS
####################################################################################################

extract_species_model_stats <- function(model_obj, analysis_label) {

  model <- model_obj$model
  model_class <- model_obj$model_class
  df <- model_obj$data_used

  if (model_class == "glmmTMB") {
    td <- broom.mixed::tidy(model, effects = "fixed", conf.int = TRUE)
    ti <- td %>% filter(term == "TrophicIndex_z")
    r2_vals <- safe_r2_vals(model)
    r2m <- unname(r2_vals["Marginal_R2"])
    r2c <- unname(r2_vals["Conditional_R2"])
  } else {
    td <- broom::tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE)
    ti <- td %>% filter(term == "TrophicIndex_z")
    r2m <- summary(model)$r.squared
    r2c <- summary(model)$r.squared
  }

  ti10 <- as.numeric(quantile(df$TrophicIndex, 0.10, na.rm = TRUE))
  ti90 <- as.numeric(quantile(df$TrophicIndex, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE))
  mu_ti <- mean(df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE)
  sd_ti <- sd(df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (!is.finite(sd_ti) || sd_ti == 0) sd_ti <- 1

  nd <- tibble(
    TrophicIndex_z = c((ti10 - mu_ti) / sd_ti, (ti90 - mu_ti) / sd_ti),
    n_transitions_z = 0,
    log_prot_pair_z = 0
  )

  if ("Phylum" %in% names(df)) {
    nd$Phylum <- factor(rep(levels(df$Phylum)[1], 2), levels = levels(df$Phylum))
  }

  if (model_class == "glmmTMB") {
    pred <- predict(model, newdata = nd, type = "link", re.form = NA)
  } else {
    pred <- predict(model, newdata = nd)
  }

  pred_resp <- plogis(pred)

  tibble(
    Analysis = analysis_label,
    response = "Mean Bray–Curtis dissimilarity",
    model_class = model_class,
    family_text = model_obj$family_text,
    fixed_effects_text = model_obj$fixed_effects_text,
    random_effects_text = model_obj$random_effects_text,
    beta = ti$estimate[1],
    conf.low = ti$conf.low[1],
    conf.high = ti$conf.high[1],
    p_value = ti$p.value[1],
    exp_beta = exp(ti$estimate[1]),
    exp_low = exp(ti$conf.low[1]),
    exp_high = exp(ti$conf.high[1]),
    R2_marginal = r2m[1],
    R2_conditional = r2c[1],
    TI10 = ti10,
    TI90 = ti90,
    pred_TI10 = pred_resp[1],
    pred_TI90 = pred_resp[2],
    delta = pred_resp[2] - pred_resp[1],
    ratio = pred_resp[2] / pred_resp[1],
    N_species = dplyr::n_distinct(df$Species_ID),
    N_rows = nrow(df),
    label = paste0(
      "β=", fmt_num_scalar(ti$estimate[1], 3),
      " [", fmt_num_scalar(ti$conf.low[1], 3), ", ", fmt_num_scalar(ti$conf.high[1], 3), "]\n",
      "p=", fmt_p_scalar(ti$p.value[1]),
      "; exp(β)=", fmt_num_scalar(exp(ti$estimate[1]), 2), "\n",
      "R²m=", fmt_num_scalar(r2m[1], 2),
      "; R²c=", fmt_num_scalar(r2c[1], 2), "\n",
      "Δ(TI10→TI90)=", fmt_num_scalar(pred_resp[2] - pred_resp[1], 3),
      "; ratio=", fmt_num_scalar(pred_resp[2] / pred_resp[1], 2), "\n",
      "N species=", dplyr::n_distinct(df$Species_ID)
    )
  )
}

####################################################################################################
# 13) PREDICTION CURVES
####################################################################################################

get_species_prediction_curve <- function(model_obj, analysis_label) {

  model <- model_obj$model
  model_class <- model_obj$model_class
  df <- model_obj$data_used

  mu_ti <- mean(df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE)
  sd_ti <- sd(df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (!is.finite(sd_ti) || sd_ti == 0) sd_ti <- 1

  ti_seq <- seq(min(df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE), max(df$TrophicIndex, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = 200)

  nd <- tibble(
    TrophicIndex_z = (ti_seq - mu_ti) / sd_ti,
    n_transitions_z = 0,
    log_prot_pair_z = 0
  )

  if ("Phylum" %in% names(df)) {
    nd$Phylum <- factor(rep(levels(df$Phylum)[1], nrow(nd)), levels = levels(df$Phylum))
  }

  if (model_class == "glmmTMB") {
    pred <- predict(model, newdata = nd, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE, re.form = NA)

    out <- nd %>%
      mutate(
        TrophicIndex = ti_seq,
        fit = pred$fit,
        se = pred$se.fit,
        conf.low = fit - 1.96 * se,
        conf.high = fit + 1.96 * se,
        predicted = plogis(fit),
        pred_low = plogis(conf.low),
        pred_high = plogis(conf.high),
        Analysis = analysis_label
      )
  } else {
    pred <- predict(model, newdata = nd, se.fit = TRUE)

    out <- nd %>%
      mutate(
        TrophicIndex = ti_seq,
        fit = pred$fit,
        se = pred$se.fit,
        conf.low = fit - 1.96 * se,
        conf.high = fit + 1.96 * se,
        predicted = plogis(fit),
        pred_low = plogis(conf.low),
        pred_high = plogis(conf.high),
        Analysis = analysis_label
      )
  }

  out
}

####################################################################################################
# 14) ANALYSIS SPECIFICATIONS
####################################################################################################

analysis_specs <- tribble(
  ~Analysis,                       ~mode,
  "Species abundance",            "species_abundance",
  "Total proteome",               "total_proteome",
  "Growth machinery",             "growth_machinery",
  "Core metabolism/biosynthesis", "core_metabolism",
  "Resource acquisition",         "resource_acquisition",
  "Transporters",                 "transporters"
)

####################################################################################################
# 15) RUN ALL ANALYSES
####################################################################################################

feature_tables <- list()
keep_tables <- list()
transition_tables <- list()
species_tables <- list()
mean_model_objs <- list()
mean_model_stats_list <- list()
mean_prediction_list <- list()
included_species_list <- list()
excluded_species_list <- list()

global_species_set <- sort(as.character(unique(species_date_keep_global$Species_ID)))

for (i in seq_len(nrow(analysis_specs))) {

  analysis_label <- analysis_specs$Analysis[i]
  mode_i <- analysis_specs$mode[i]

  cat("\n============================================================\n")
  cat("Running:", analysis_label, "\n")
  cat("============================================================\n")

  ft <- build_feature_table(mode_i)
  feature_tables[[analysis_label]] <- ft

  keep_tbl <- build_analysis_keep_tbl(ft, analysis_label)
  keep_tables[[analysis_label]] <- keep_tbl

  included_species_list[[analysis_label]] <- tibble(
    Analysis = analysis_label,
    Species_ID = sort(as.character(unique(keep_tbl$Species_ID)))
  )

  excluded_species_list[[analysis_label]] <- tibble(
    Analysis = analysis_label,
    Species_ID = setdiff(global_species_set, sort(as.character(unique(keep_tbl$Species_ID))))
  )

  cat("QC-passed species:", dplyr::n_distinct(keep_tbl$Species_ID), "\n")
  cat("QC-passed species×dates:", nrow(keep_tbl), "\n")

  if (dplyr::n_distinct(keep_tbl$Species_ID) < 5) {
    warning("Too few species after analysis-specific QC for: ", analysis_label)
    next
  }

  trans_tbl <- compute_transitions_bc(ft, keep_tbl, analysis_label)
  transition_tables[[analysis_label]] <- trans_tbl

  if (nrow(trans_tbl) == 0) {
    warning("No transitions available for: ", analysis_label)
    next
  }

  species_tbl <- summarise_species_variability(trans_tbl)
  species_tables[[analysis_label]] <- species_tbl

  mean_model_obj <- fit_species_model_safe(species_tbl, response_col = "mean_bc_logit")
  mean_model_objs[[analysis_label]] <- mean_model_obj

  mean_model_stats_list[[analysis_label]] <- extract_species_model_stats(mean_model_obj, analysis_label)
  mean_prediction_list[[analysis_label]] <- get_species_prediction_curve(mean_model_obj, analysis_label)
}

####################################################################################################
# 16) COMBINE OUTPUT TABLES
####################################################################################################

transition_results <- bind_rows(transition_tables)
species_results <- bind_rows(species_tables)
mean_model_stats_df <- bind_rows(mean_model_stats_list)
mean_prediction_df <- bind_rows(mean_prediction_list)
included_species_df <- bind_rows(included_species_list)
excluded_species_df <- bind_rows(excluded_species_list)

transition_results <- transition_results %>%
  mutate(Analysis = factor(Analysis, levels = analysis_order))

species_results <- species_results %>%
  mutate(Analysis = factor(Analysis, levels = analysis_order))

mean_prediction_df <- mean_prediction_df %>%
  mutate(Analysis = factor(Analysis, levels = analysis_order))

mean_model_stats_df <- mean_model_stats_df %>%
  mutate(Analysis = factor(Analysis, levels = analysis_order))

####################################################################################################
# 17) FIGURE 1 — COEFFICIENT COMPARISON ACROSS ANALYSIS SPACES
####################################################################################################

coef_plot_df <- mean_model_stats_df %>%
  mutate(
    Analysis = factor(Analysis, levels = rev(analysis_order))
  )

p_coef <- ggplot(coef_plot_df, aes(x = beta, y = Analysis)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high),
    height = 0.18,
    linewidth = 0.45
  ) +
  geom_point(size = 2.2) +
  labs(
    title = "Functional specificity of trophic-index effects on temporal variability",
    subtitle = "Species-level mean Bray–Curtis dissimilarity models across six analysis spaces",
    x = "Trophic-index coefficient",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_nature_clean()

print(p_coef)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(outdir, "Final_FunctionalSpecificity_coefficients.png"),
  plot = p_coef,
  width = 9.5,
  height = 5.8,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

####################################################################################################
# 18) FIGURE 2 — MULTI-ROW FITTED RESPONSE PANELS
####################################################################################################

make_row_plot <- function(analysis_label) {

  dat <- species_results %>%
    filter(Analysis == analysis_label) %>%
    droplevels()

  pred <- mean_prediction_df %>%
    filter(Analysis == analysis_label)

  mod_stats <- mean_model_stats_df %>%
    filter(Analysis == analysis_label)

  label_df <- tibble(
    x = Inf,
    y = Inf,
    label = mod_stats$label[1]
  )

  ggplot() +
    geom_point(
      data = dat,
      aes(x = TrophicIndex, y = mean_bc, fill = TrophicGroup),
      shape = 21,
      color = "grey25",
      stroke = 0.2,
      size = 2.0,
      alpha = 0.80
    ) +
    geom_ribbon(
      data = pred,
      aes(x = TrophicIndex, ymin = pred_low, ymax = pred_high),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      alpha = 0.18,
      fill = "grey55"
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = pred,
      aes(x = TrophicIndex, y = predicted),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      linewidth = 0.95,
      color = "black"
    ) +
    geom_label(
      data = label_df,
      aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      hjust = 1.02,
      vjust = 1.02,
      size = 2.9,
      linewidth = 0.25,
      fill = "white",
      label.padding = unit(0.15, "lines")
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1.02), clip = "off") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = trophic_cols, drop = FALSE) +
    labs(
      title = analysis_label,
      x = "Trophic index",
      y = "Mean consecutive-date Bray–Curtis dissimilarity"
    ) +
    theme_nature_clean() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.margin = margin(5.5, 18, 5.5, 5.5)
    )
}

row_plots <- lapply(analysis_order, make_row_plot)

fit_figure <- wrap_plots(row_plots, ncol = 1) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Fitted trophic-index responses across abundance, whole-proteome, and functional spaces",
    subtitle = "Species-level mean Bray–Curtis dissimilarity"
  )

print(fit_figure)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(outdir, "Final_FunctionalSpecificity_fitted_panels.png"),
  plot = fit_figure,
  width = 8.8,
  height = 18.0,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

####################################################################################################
# 19) SUMMARY TABLE — PORTRAIT FORMAT, COLUMNS = ANALYSIS SPACES
#     EXCLUDES TRANSPORTERS
####################################################################################################

summary_table_source <- mean_model_stats_df %>%
  filter(Analysis %in% table_analysis_order) %>%
  arrange(match(Analysis, table_analysis_order))

summary_table_portrait <- tibble(
  Metric = c(
    "Response",
    "Model family",
    "Fixed effects",
    "Random effects",
    "N species",
    "Trophic-index estimate",
    "95% CI",
    "Trophic-index p",
    "exp(beta)",
    "Marginal R²",
    "Conditional R²",
    "Delta TI10 to TI90",
    "Ratio TI90/TI10"
  )
)

for (an in table_analysis_order) {
  row_i <- summary_table_source %>% filter(Analysis == an)

  summary_table_portrait[[an]] <- c(
    row_i$response,
    row_i$family_text,
    row_i$fixed_effects_text,
    row_i$random_effects_text,
    as.character(row_i$N_species),
    fmt_num_scalar(row_i$beta, 3),
    paste0("[", fmt_num_scalar(row_i$conf.low, 3), ", ", fmt_num_scalar(row_i$conf.high, 3), "]"),
    fmt_p_scalar(row_i$p_value),
    fmt_num_scalar(row_i$exp_beta, 2),
    fmt_num_scalar(row_i$R2_marginal, 3),
    fmt_num_scalar(row_i$R2_conditional, 3),
    fmt_num_scalar(row_i$delta, 3),
    fmt_num_scalar(row_i$ratio, 2)
  )
}

write_csv(
  summary_table_portrait,
  file.path(outdir, "Final_FunctionalSpecificity_summary_table_portrait.csv")
)

summary_table_gt <- summary_table_portrait %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**Functional specificity of trophic-index effects on temporal variability**"),
    subtitle = "Species abundance, total proteome, growth machinery, core metabolism / biosynthesis, and resource acquisition"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    Metric = "",
    `Species abundance` = "Species abundance",
    `Total proteome` = "Total proteome",
    `Growth machinery` = "Growth machinery",
    `Core metabolism/biosynthesis` = "Core metabolism/\nbiosynthesis",
    `Resource acquisition` = "Resource acquisition"
  ) %>%
  cols_align(
    align = "left",
    columns = c(Metric)
  ) %>%
  cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = c(
      `Species abundance`,
      `Total proteome`,
      `Growth machinery`,
      `Core metabolism/biosynthesis`,
      `Resource acquisition`
    )
  ) %>%
  cols_width(
    Metric ~ px(220),
    `Species abundance` ~ px(190),
    `Total proteome` ~ px(190),
    `Growth machinery` ~ px(190),
    `Core metabolism/biosynthesis` ~ px(210),
    `Resource acquisition` ~ px(190)
  ) %>%
  opt_row_striping() %>%
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = px(10),
    data_row.padding = px(5),
    column_labels.font.size = px(10),
    heading.title.font.size = px(13),
    heading.subtitle.font.size = px(10)
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = md(
      "Transporters were excluded from this comparative portrait table because they were already shown separately as the focal mechanistic subset. Species abundance is included as a temporal reference baseline. Proteome-based feature spaces were constructed from iBAQ-normalized abundances summed per KEGG ortholog. Growth machinery, core metabolism / biosynthesis, and resource acquisition were defined from explicit KEGG subcategory labels."
    )
  )

print(summary_table_gt)

gtsave(
  summary_table_gt,
  filename = file.path(outdir, "Final_FunctionalSpecificity_summary_table_portrait.png"),
  vwidth = 1700,
  vheight = 1100
)

gtsave(
  summary_table_gt,
  filename = file.path(outdir, "Final_FunctionalSpecificity_summary_table_portrait.html")
)

####################################################################################################
# 20) WRITE CORE OUTPUT TABLES
####################################################################################################

write_csv(transition_results, file.path(outdir, "Final_transition_level_results.csv"))
write_csv(species_results, file.path(outdir, "Final_species_level_results.csv"))
write_csv(mean_model_stats_df, file.path(outdir, "Final_mean_model_stats_full.csv"))
write_csv(included_species_df, file.path(outdir, "Included_species_by_analysis.csv"))
write_csv(excluded_species_df, file.path(outdir, "Excluded_species_by_analysis.csv"))

####################################################################################################
# 21) CONSOLE SUMMARY
####################################################################################################

cat("\nDone.\n")
cat("Outputs written to: ", outdir, "\n", sep = "")
cat("\nMain figures:\n")
cat(file.path(outdir, "Final_FunctionalSpecificity_coefficients.png"), "\n")
cat(file.path(outdir, "Final_FunctionalSpecificity_fitted_panels.png"), "\n")
cat("\nTables:\n")
cat(file.path(outdir, "Final_FunctionalSpecificity_summary_table_portrait.csv"), "\n")
cat(file.path(outdir, "Final_FunctionalSpecificity_summary_table_portrait.png"), "\n")
cat(file.path(outdir, "Final_transition_level_results.csv"), "\n")
cat(file.path(outdir, "Final_species_level_results.csv"), "\n")
cat(file.path(outdir, "Final_mean_model_stats_full.csv"), "\n")
cat(file.path(outdir, "Included_species_by_analysis.csv"), "\n")
cat(file.path(outdir, "Excluded_species_by_analysis.csv"), "\n")
```
